issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) filter for FILM type card, (2) exclusion of [Buena Festa], (3) limit of 'up to 1' card, (4) the deck inspection mechanic (look at 5 cards from top), (5) reordering of remaining cards to bottom of deck

Effect does not capture the multi-step sequence: inspect top 5 → reveal and select up to 1 FILM (excluding Buena Festa) → add to hand → reorder rest to bottom. Current DSL represents only a basic search.

actions.notes: Remaining 4 cards placed at bottom of deck in any order
